findings.triage_rationale: Genuine — cited source 404s and the 42% claim is not present in any primary source linked from the deck; blocking factual integrity defect.
findings.text: Headline claim unsupported by cited source
findings.rationale: Linked source does not contain the 42% figure asserted in the headline; risks credibility loss with stakeholder review.
findings.fix: Replace with verifiable figure from primary source or remove claim

findings.triage_rationale: Non-genuine — brief tone='dense-analytical' explicitly justifies high text density on baseline slides; reviewer applied generic 7-line heuristic without context.
findings.rationale: Nine lines of body copy on a single slide forces reader context-switch and reduces retention.
findings.fix: Split into two slides or compress to 5 bullet points

findings.triage_rationale: Genuine — '$1,200' vs 'USD 1200' inconsistency confirmed on inspection of the rendered slide; cheap fix.
findings.text: Inconsistent currency formatting across pricing tiers
findings.rationale: Tier A uses '$1,200' while Tier B uses 'USD 1200' — violates table consistency.
findings.fix: Normalize all currency cells to '$X,XXX' format

findings.triage_rationale: Non-genuine — footer weight contrast is intentional brand-template choice; reviewer flagged on cycle 1 but inspection confirms it matches the Sourcevo deck spec.
findings.text: Footer page number font weight differs from body
findings.rationale: Reviewer flagged on cycle 1; on inspection the footer uses the brand template's intentional weight contrast — not a defect.

findings.triage_rationale: Genuine — Q2 end (2026-09-30) and Q3 start (2026-09-15) overlap is a logical inconsistency; must be fixed before stakeholder review.
findings.text: Q3 milestone date conflicts with Q2 end date
findings.rationale: Timeline shows Q2 ending 2026-09-30 and Q3 starting 2026-09-15 — overlap renders sequencing incoherent.
findings.fix: Align quarter boundaries; Q3 should start 2026-10-01

findings.triage_rationale: Genuine — three milestone colors used without legend; viewer cannot infer status mapping. Cheap inline-legend fix.
findings.text: Missing legend for milestone color coding
findings.rationale: Three colors used for milestone markers without legend; viewer must infer meaning.
findings.fix: Add inline legend mapping color to milestone status
